text.title: AI Feature Progressive Rollout Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the ai-feature-progressive-rollout methodology end-to-end.

step.name: define-rings-and-dwell
step.action: Standard rings: 1% / 10% / 50% / 100%. Dwell ≥ time-to-detect-regression in observability (commonly 24h).

step.name: set-gates-per-ring
step.action: Per ring transition: eval delta green, observability pillars no red, no open incident.
step.decision-gate: Never skip a gate to make a launch date — log the deferred-launch decision instead.

step.name: communicate-at-material-rings
step.action: ≥50% ring requires external comm if user-visible change; ≥10% requires internal comm.

step.name: monitor-and-promote
step.action: Walk rings; promote on gates green; roll back on red.

step.name: close-rollout-and-record
step.action: Mark rollout complete; archive ring history.
